embedding.kb_propagation: Embedding corruption -> all downstream representations degraded from layer 0 -> global performance collapse

ffn.kb_propagation: FFN activation/weight error -> intermediate representation distortion -> residual stream contamination -> output degradation

kernel.kb_propagation: Backend fault -> runtime/memory anomaly -> indirect performance impact (if any). Often no accuracy impact.

layernorm.kb_propagation: LayerNorm corruption -> residual stream scale/shift distortion -> gradient flow disruption -> training instability

masking.kb_propagation: Mask corruption -> unauthorized attention to masked positions -> information leakage -> degraded generalization

output.kb_propagation: Output projection error -> logit distribution distortion -> calibration loss -> decision boundary shift

positional.kb_propagation: Position signal corruption -> loss of sequential ordering -> position-dependent accuracy drops -> model treats input as bag-of-tokens

qkv.kb_propagation: QKV corruption -> attention score distortion -> attention pattern collapse/divergence -> logit degradation

residual.kb_propagation: Residual corruption -> gradient highway broken -> deep layer gradients vanish -> catastrophic training failure

score.kb_propagation: Score computation error -> softmax input distortion -> attention weight collapse/explosion -> downstream degradation

variant.kb_propagation: Wrong attention variant -> fundamentally different attention computation -> model behavior diverges from expected

remediation.family_guidance: Layer normalization fault -- normalization statistics or affine parameters corrupted
remediation.subcategory_guidance: LayerNorm scale (gamma) corrupted -- variance distortion. Layer outputs will have wrong scale.
steps: 1. Verify gamma initialized to 1.0, beta to 0.0
2. Check eps value (typically 1e-5 or 1e-6)
3. Verify normalization axis (should be last dimension for LayerNorm)
4. Compare ln_std and ln_mean_abs across layers: should be smooth, not spiky

remediation.family_guidance: Kernel/backend fault -- computational backend or memory management issue

differential_diagnosis.propagation_path: Embedding corruption -> all downstream representations degraded from layer 0 -> global performance collapse

remediation.family_guidance: Input embedding fault -- token or type embeddings corrupted
remediation.subcategory_guidance: Embedding vectors swapped -- some tokens map to wrong representations. Partial accuracy loss on affected tokens.
steps: 1. Verify embedding table shape: (vocab_size, d_model)
2. Check embedding norm distribution: should be roughly uniform across vocabulary
3. For type embeddings: verify num_token_types matches task (2 for sentence pairs)
4. If embedding norm is near-zero: initialization or zeroing bug
